<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

- This workspace is a monorepo with a FastAPI backend and a Vite React TypeScript frontend.
- The backend exposes a DuckDB cache and serves the built frontend.
- Prefer using async APIs and type annotations in both Python and TypeScript code.
- Use FastAPI best practices for API endpoints and static file serving.
- Use React best practices for frontend code, and prefer functional components and hooks.
- When visualizing map data, use a modern mapping library (e.g., Leaflet, MapLibre, or Google Maps JS API).
